docs.title: Eirath Adventures
docs.text:
Chronicles of blood and iron from the world of Eirath.

This is the session archive and campaign wiki for Eirath Adventures — a record of who the party is, what they've done, and the world that keeps testing them. It's a fresh campaign: the pages below fill in as sessions are played and summarized.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
1. Fill in world/world.md with your setting — nations, regions, factions, and pantheon.
  2. Record and transcribe your first session (see README.md), then drop the materials into sessions-raw/<DATE>/.
  3. Run the summarize latest session skill to generate the session page and wiki entries, and build world data to build this home page.
  4. publish site to push it live.
